name: Spanish-Style Braised Chicken and Almonds
description: From The Complete Mediterranean Cookbook (ATK), p.295. Bone-in chicken thighs braised in a white-wine and tomato sauce, finished with toasted slivered almonds, parsley, and lemon. Serve with crusty bread or rice.
recipeIngredient: 1 (14.5-oz) can whole peeled tomatoes, drained and chopped
Crusty bread or rice, for serving
recipeInstructions: Brown the seasoned thighs; set aside.
Soften onions, then add garlic, bay leaf, and cinnamon.
Add wine and tomatoes, return the chicken, and braise in the oven until tender.
Grind some toasted almonds to thicken the sauce; finish with parsley, lemon juice, and the remaining almonds.
